comments.body:
Need assistance from L3 team:

**Case:** Shopify unfulfilled orders missing in MCSL

**Details:**
A customer on the **$49 Premium plan** has reported that order imports usually work after force-importing products and orders. However, in this instance, the customer shared three orders, out of which **two orders are not importing** despite multiple force import attempts.

We have verified that the products are already imported and that the orders are in **unfulfilled** status in Shopify. Could you please review this and share your inputs on why these orders are not being imported into MCSL?

**Orders in question:**
#LBA-73008, #LBA-73006

**Store details:**
Store URL: loisivethe.myshopify.com
Store UID: 7bb06e79-0355-4e1c-a6ba-fbd1da3c24d3

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/Xk1fr5YEk8kq4fdUNEm5gBeO5/?name=image.png)
 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/3rux2ZMd9dEjupoEY95u9xN0d/?name=image.png)
comments.html_body:

We have verified that the products are already imported and that the orders are in unfulfilled status in Shopify. Could you please review this and share your inputs on why these orders are not being imported into MCSL?

comments.body:
Hello Aza,

Our team has checked about this and confirm that all the products are imported to the app and the orders would also get imported automatically.

If this happen again, please do not Force Import the products manually and wait for sometime for the orders to get imported automatically. If this is not happening even after sometime, reach out to us and share the order number.

Also, do not take any further action from your end for us to investigate the case.

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Aza,
 
Our team has checked about this and confirm that all the products are imported to the app and the orders would also get imported automatically. 
 
If this happen again, please do not Force Import the products manually and wait for sometime for the orders to get imported automatically. If this is not happening even after sometime, reach out to us and share the order number. 
 
Also, do not take any further action from your end for us to investigate the case.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive

Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Aza & Team,

Thank you for your reply.

For Ireland, postal codes are alphanumeric and are fully supported, so there should be no problem with the format itself. However, it appears that the postal code or address details may be incorrect, which is causing the shipping rates and label generation to fail. Please note that the app passes the address exactly as entered, and UPS is responsible for validating the shipping address.

Based on the Google address, the city name is **Castleblayney**, whereas the order currently shows **Castleblaney**. I kindly request you to cross-check and update the address with the correct details, then try processing the order again.
To update the address, please go to **App → Orders**, search for **Order #72941**, open the order, edit the shipping address, and then try generating the label.

Regarding your query about fixing this case permanently, we are happy to investigate this further and provide a long-term solution. To do so, we would need some time (a couple of hours) to review the logs. Since you need to process the order immediately, we have force-imported the order from our end to allow you to generate the label for now.

Please let us know if you are okay with waiting for some time if this case occurs again. We can then review the case in detail and provide a proper fix.

Feel free to reach out to us anytime if you need assistance from our end.

Best regards,
Manohar V
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Aza & Team,
 
Thank you for your reply.
 
For Ireland, postal codes are alphanumeric and are fully supported, so there should be no problem with the format itself. However, it appears that the postal code or address details may be incorrect, which is causing the shipping rates and label generation to fail. Please note that the app passes the address exactly as entered, and UPS is responsible for validating the shipping address.
 
Based on the Google address, the city name is Castleblayney, whereas the order currently shows Castleblaney. I kindly request you to cross-check and update the address with the correct details, then try processing the order again.
To update the address, please go to App → Orders, search for Order #72941, open the order, edit the shipping address, and then try generating the label.
 
Regarding your query about fixing this case permanently, we are happy to investigate this further and provide a long-term solution. To do so, we would need some time (a couple of hours) to review the logs. Since you need to process the order immediately, we have force-imported the order from our end to allow you to generate the label for now.
 
Please let us know if you are okay with waiting for some time if this case occurs again. We can then review the case in detail and provide a proper fix.
 
Feel free to reach out to us anytime if you need assistance from our end.
 
Best regards,
Manohar V
PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Aza,

Good Day!

Orders 73104 and 73102 are now available in the app for label generation.

Could you please let us know if you are adding new products in Shopify on a regular basis as it seems like some new products are not syncing with the app right away resulting in the orders not importing having those products.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

Awaiting your response.

comments.body:
Hello To Van & Team,

We are actively working on this case. At the moment, we do not have an estimated timeline to share, but we will keep you informed of any updates.

If you encounter the order import failure again, please share the order number before attempting to re-import it. This will help us capture the updated logs and investigate the issue more effectively.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
Manohar V
PluginHive

Need assistance from L3 team

**Case:** Order not imported
**Reason:** Product variant not imported

**Details:**
This is a $49 Premium Plan customer who has reported this order import issue multiple times. They have mentioned that the problem is recurring daily, resulting in missed orders and unfulfilled shipments.

If we are unable to provide a permanent fix, the customer has indicated that they may consider uninstalling the app.

We kindly request your support in reviewing this case and providing a permanent resolution at the earliest.

**Store Details:**
Store URL: loisivethe.myshopify.com

Hello Aza & Team,

Good day!

I’m pleased to inform you that we are actively working on this case and will be providing a permanent fix soon.

In the meantime, I have a workaround that will help you quickly retrieve the missing orders and proceed with shipment processing. I’ve attached a short video explaining the steps. Could you please take a look and try it the next time you notice that an order has not been imported?

Please let us know if you need any assistance or additional information from our end.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Team,

Good day!

We are actively working on this case and will keep you informed as soon as we have an update.

In the meantime, we have provided the **Bulk Force Import Product** option, which allows you to sync the missing products in one click and proceed with processing the orders. Please refer to the attached short video for guidance.

Rest assured, we will share further updates as soon as they are available.

We appreciate your cooperation, and please feel free to reach out to us anytime if you need any assistance from our end.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Mingxia,

Apologies for the delay.

Upon checking, all three orders have already been **fulfilled manually in Shopify**, and therefore, they cannot be imported into the app.

May I confirm if the shipping labels were created outside the app? If not, could you please **unfulfill the orders in Shopify**? Once that is done, we will quickly check from our end and assist with importing the orders.

Looking forward to hearing back from you.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
